accepted_conclusion: No tested structured conditional regularizer should replace the accepted final LoBiFlow defaults. The fresh 3-seed 20k sweep shows both history-local causal OT and conditional current matching help cryptos, but synthetic, optiver, and es_mbp_10 are neutral-to-negative by 20k, so the effect is dataset-specific rather than generic.

causal_ot_global.summary: Helped on cryptos, hurt on optiver.

causal_ot_history_local.summary: Fresh 3-seed 20k sweep improves cryptos at every checkpoint, including 20k, but is neutral-to-negative on synthetic, optiver, and es_mbp_10.

current_matching_safe.summary: Fresh 3-seed 20k sweep improves cryptos and is strongest at 20k there, but degrades synthetic, optiver, and es_mbp_10 by the final checkpoint.

training_curve_20k_meta.source: fresh from-scratch sweeps with max_steps=20000; not appended from 12k runs
